query: SELECT id, awayTeam, homeTeam, gameDate FROM games WHERE gameDate = '2026-03-26' AND sport = 'MLB' AND (awayTeam IN ('PIT','CHA','WAS') OR homeTeam IN ('NYN','MIL','CHN')) ORDER BY id;
